    1. pluginFactory(Class, Class, String, ClassLoader)
    2. construct(TypedValue...)

Schnittstelle PluginFactory<A>

Typparameter:
A - the type of the plugin contract (interface)
Alle Superschnittstellen:
PluginConstructor<A>
Funktionsschnittstelle:
Dies ist eine funktionale Schnittstelle, die somit als Zuweisungsziel für einen Lambdaausdruck oder eine Methodenreferenz verwendet werden kann.
@FunctionalInterface public interface PluginFactory<A> extends PluginConstructor<A>

A factory for creating plugin instances that are wrapped in a thread-safe proxy.

The factory uses ByteBuddy to generate a proxy class at runtime that implements the specified contract and delegates all calls to an underlying implementation instance. Access to the implementation is synchronized using a ReadWriteLock.

Seit:
1.0.0

    pluginFactory(@NonNull Class<A> contract, @NonNull Class<? extends A> implementation, @NonNull String fullyQualifiedName, @NonNull ClassLoader classLoader)

  • Methodendetails

    • pluginFactory

      static <A> PluginFactory<A> pluginFactory(@NonNull Class<A> contract, @NonNull Class<? extends A> implementation, @NonNull String fullyQualifiedName, @NonNull ClassLoader classLoader)

      Creates a new PluginFactory for the given contract and implementation.

      Typparameter:
      A - the type of the plugin contract
      Parameter:
      contract - the interface that the plugin must implement; must not be null
      implementation - the concrete class providing the implementation; must not be null
      fullyQualifiedName - the fully qualified name for the generated proxy class; must not be null
      classLoader - the ClassLoader to use for loading the proxy class; must not be null
      Gibt zurück:
      a new PluginFactory instance
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException - if contract is not an interface, implementation is not a concrete class, or if the proxy class cannot be generated
      NullPointerException - if any of the parameters is null
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • construct

      @NonNull A construct(@NonNull TypedValue<?>... arguments)

      Constructs a new instance of the plugin using the provided arguments.

      Angegeben von:
      construct in Schnittstelle PluginConstructor<A>
      Parameter:
      arguments - the arguments to pass to the implementation's constructor; must not be null
      Gibt zurück:
      a thread-safe proxy instance implementing the contract
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the implementation cannot be instantiated (e.g., matching constructor not found)
      NullPointerException - if arguments is null
      Seit:
      1.0.0
